symptoms.symptom_name: Known Addison's disease with inability to retain oral steroid replacement

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Direct precipitant of crisis in a cortisol-dependent patient.

symptoms.symptom_name: Confusion/altered mental status reported by spouse
Availability of emergency injectable hydrocortisone kit at home

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Confirms this is an anticipated sick-day emergency scenario for which a bridging treatment exists.
Classic examination findings of Addisonian crisis; clinician-only findings sealed from telehealth chat.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Known Addison's disease with inability to absorb oral steroids, severe weakness/near-syncope, and confusion together confirm an evolving life-threatening crisis.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Immediate IV/IM hydrocortisone and IV fluid resuscitation by ambulance/ED
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Definitive emergency treatment for adrenal crisis.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Serum cortisol, electrolytes (looking for hyponatraemia/hyperkalaemia), and glucose
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms the biochemical picture of adrenal crisis, though treatment should not wait for results.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Routine GP review in the coming days
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Would dangerously delay life-saving emergency treatment needed now.
